name: Standalone Upload Button
uri: N/A — component is not routed; rendered wherever the parent mounts it
notes: Standalone React functional component that is NOT mounted in App.jsx — it exists as an alternative upload implementation alongside DocumentGrid's built-in upload area.
Hidden <input type='file'> accepts .pdf, .jpg, .jpeg, .png; the visible button programmatically triggers it via a ref click.
On file selection, sends multipart/form-data (fields: 'file', 'name') to POST /api/upload via uploadDocument() from utils/api.js; no 'tags' field is submitted.
Calls the onUploadComplete(response.data) prop on success, enabling parent components to refresh state; status messages are rendered inline below the button.
Auth: all /api/* routes require a JWT Bearer token stored in localStorage under 'docvault_token'; a missing or invalid token causes the axios interceptor to log a 401 warning and reject the request.
